document.description: The document section allows to change all the parameters pertaining to the document (title, url, file type, etc.).

referenceData.description: Defines an object that is generated by the integrator to uniquely identify a file in its system.

info.description: The document info section allows to change additional parameters for the document.

owner.description: Defines the name of the document owner/creator.

folder.description: Defines the folder where the document is stored (can be empty in case the document is stored in the root folder).

sharingSettings.description: Displays the information about the settings which allow to share the document with other users.

favorite.description:
Defines the highlighting state of the Favorite icon. 
When the user clicks the icon, the onMetaChange event is called.

permissions.description: The document permission section allows to change the permission for the document to be edited and downloaded or not.

title.description: Defines the desired file name for the viewed or edited document which will also be used as file name when the document is downloaded.

url.description: Defines the absolute URL where the source viewed or edited document is stored.

fileType.description: Defines the type of the file for the source viewed or edited document.

key.description:
Defines the unique document identifier used by the service to recognize the document.
- Every time the document is edited and saved, the key must be generated anew.
- In case the known key is sent, the document will be taken from the cache.

isForm.description: Defines if the PDF file is a PDF form or a standard PDF file.

editorConfig.description: The editorConfig section allows to change the parameters pertaining to the editor interface: opening mode (viewer or editor), interface language, additional buttons, etc.

actionLink.description: Specifies the data received from the **document editing service** using the `onMakeActionLink` event or the `onRequestSendNotify` event in `data.actionLink` parameter, which contains the information about the action in the document that will be scrolled to.

mode.description: Defines the editor opening mode.

location.description:
Defines the default measurement units.
@deprecated Starting from version 8.2, use the `region` parameter instead.

createUrl.description:
Defines the absolute URL of the document where it will be created and available after creation.  
- If not specified, the **Create** button will not be displayed.  
- Instead of this parameter, you can use the `onRequestCreateNew` event.

callbackUrl.description:
Specifies the absolute URL to the **document storage service**.  
- This service must be implemented by the software integrators who use ONLYOFFICE Docs on their own server.  
- Url for connection between sdk and portal.

region.description:
Defines the default display format for **currency**, **date**, and **time** (in the **Spreadsheet Editor** only).  
- Is set using the four letter (en-US, fr-FR, etc.) language codes.

user.description: Defines the **user** currently viewing or editing the document.

id.description:
The identification of the user.  
This information is stored and used to:  
- distinguish co-authors,  
- indicate the author of the last changes when saving and highlighting history (in the list of changes),  
- count users with access for a license (based on the number of users).

name.description: The full name of the user.

group.description:
The group (or several groups separated with commas) the user belongs to.
Can be used for `customization.reviewPermissions`, `permissions.reviewGroups`, or `permissions.commentGroups`.

image.description: The path to the user's avatar.

roles.description:
Defines the roles assigned to the user.  
- Used for **PDF forms**, fill form with `Role1`.

recent.description: Defines the presence or absence of the documents in the **Open Recent...** menu option.

templates.description: Defines the presence or absence of the templates in the **Create New...** menu option.

logo.description:
Changes the image file at the top left corner of the editor header.  
The recommended image height is **20 pixels**.

image.description:
Path to the image file used to show in the common work mode (view and edit modes for all editors) or in the embedded mode.  
The image must have the following size: **172x40**.

imageDark.description:
Path to the image file used for the dark header (for example, in a dark theme or in a theme with a colored header).
The image must have the following size: **172x40**.

imageLight.description:
Path to the image file used for the **light header** (for example, in the Gray theme).  
The image must have the following size: **172x40**.

url.description:
The absolute URL which will be used when someone clicks the logo image.  
Can be used to go to your website, etc.  
Leave as an empty string or `null` to make the logo not clickable.

customer.description: Contains the information which will be displayed in the editor **About** section and is visible to all editor users.

name.description: The name of the company or person who gives access to the editors or the editor authors.

address.description: Postal address of the company or person who gives access to the editors or the editor authors.

mail.description: Email address of the company or person who gives access to the editors or the editor authors.

www.description: Home website address of the above company or person.

phone.description: The phone of the company or person who gives access to the editors or the editor authors.

info.description: Some additional information about the company or person you want the others to know.

logo.description:
The path to the image logo.  
- No special recommendations for this file, but it is recommended to use **.png** format with a transparent background.  
- The image must have the following size: **432x70**.

logoDark.description:
The path to the image logo for the **dark theme**.  
- No special recommendations for this file, but it is recommended to use **.png** format with a transparent background.  
- The image must have the following size: **432x70**.

about.description: Defines if the **About** menu button is displayed or hidden.

feedback.description:
Defines settings for the **Feedback & Support** menu button.  
- Can be either **boolean** (simply displays or hides the button) or **object** (to configure settings).

visible.description: Shows or hides the **Feedback & Support** menu button.

url.description: The absolute URL to the website which will be opened when clicking the **Feedback & Support** menu button.

goback.description: Defines settings for the **Open file location** menu button and the upper right corner button.

blank.description: Opens the website in a new browser tab/window (if `true`) or the current tab (if `false`) when the **Open file location** button is clicked.

requestClose.description:
Defines that if the **Open file location** button is clicked, the `events.onRequestClose` event is called instead of opening a browser tab or window.
@deprecated Starting from version 8.1, use the `close` parameter instead.

text.description: The text which will be displayed for the **Open file location** menu button and upper right corner button (i.e. instead of Go to Documents).

url.description: The absolute URL to the website which will be opened when clicking the **Open file location** menu button.

close.description: Defines settings for the **cross button** to close the editor.

visible.description: Defines if the cross button to close the editor is displayed or hidden.

text.description: Defines the tooltip text for the cross button in the editor header or the menu item text in the mobile editors and in the **File** menu of the web editors.

anonymous.description: Adds a request for the anonymous name.

request.description: Defines if the request is sent or not.

label.description: A postfix added to the user name.

review.description: Contains the information about the **review mode**.

hideReviewDisplay.description: Defines if the **Display mode** button is displayed or hidden on the **Collaboration** tab.

hoverMode.description: Defines the review display mode: show reviews in tooltips by hovering the changes (`true`) or in balloons by clicking the changes (`false`).

reviewDisplay.description:
Defines the review editing mode which will be used when the document is opened for viewing.
It will only be available for the document editor if mode is set to **view**. Can take the following values:

showReviewChanges.description: Defines if the review changes panel is automatically displayed or hidden when the editor is loaded.

trackChanges.description:
Defines if the document is opened in the review editing mode (`true`) or not (`false`) regardless of the `document.permissions.review` parameter.  
If `undefined`, the `document.permissions.review` value is used for all document users.

layout.description: Defines the parameters that the user can use to hide the interface elements but not to disable features completely (for example, if this functionality is available from other elements such as context menu, or via hotkeys).

toolbar.description:
Defines the **toolbar** settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **toolbar** will be displayed or hidden.

file.description:
Defines the **File** tab settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **File** tab will be displayed or hidden.

close.description: Defines if the **Close** menu option is displayed or hidden.

settings.description: Defines if the **Advanced settings** option is displayed or hidden.

info.description: Defines if the **Document info** option is displayed or hidden.

save.description: Defines if the **Save** option is displayed or hidden.

home.description: Defines the Home tab settings. This tab cannot be hidden.

mailmerge.description:
Defines if the button for choosing the mail merge base is displayed or hidden.
@deprecated Please use the `toolbar.collaboration.mailmerge` parameter instead.

insert.description:
Defines the **Insert** tab settings.  
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **Insert** tab will be displayed or hidden.

file.description: Text from file button in **Document Editor**.

layout.description:
Defines if the **Layout** tab is displayed or hidden. 
This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor** and the **Spreadsheet Editor**.

references.description:
Defines if the **References** tab is displayed or hidden. 
This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor**.

collaboration.description:
Defines the **Collaboration** tab settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **Collaboration** tab will be displayed or hidden.

mailmerge.description: Defines if the button for choosing the **mail merge** base is displayed or hidden.

draw.description: Defines if the **Draw** tab is displayed or hidden.

protect.description: Defines if the **Protection** tab is displayed or hidden.

plugins.description: Defines if the **Plugins** tab is displayed or hidden.

view.description:
Defines the **View** tab settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **View** tab will be displayed or hidden.

navigation.description:
Defines if the **Navigation** button is displayed or hidden. 
The default value is `true`. This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor**.

save.description: Defines if the **Save** button on the toolbar is displayed or hidden.

editMode.description: Defines if a button for switching editor modes will be displayed in the header or not.

save.description: Defines if the **Save** button in the editor header is displayed or hidden.

user.description: Defines if the icon with the user's avatar/initials in the editor header is displayed or hidden.

users.description: Defines if the button with the editing users is displayed or hidden.

leftMenu.description:
Defines the **left menu** settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **left menu** will be displayed or hidden.

mode.description:
Defines the initial value of the left panel visibility - displayed or hidden. 
It is used for the **Left panel** menu option on the **View** tab.

navigation.description:
Defines if the **Navigation** button is displayed or hidden. 
This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor**.

spellcheck.description:
Defines if the **Spellcheck** button is displayed or hidden. 
This parameter will only be available for the **Spreadsheet Editor**.

rightMenu.description:
Defines the **right menu** settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **right menu** will be displayed or hidden.

mode.description:
Defines the initial value of the right panel visibility - displayed or hidden. 
It is used for the **Right panel** menu option on the **View** tab.

statusBar.description:
Defines the **status bar** settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the status bar will be displayed or hidden.

actionStatus.description: Defines if an **action status** is displayed or hidden.

docLang.description:
Defines if a button for choosing the **document language** is displayed or hidden. 
This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor** and the **Presentation Editor**.

textLang.description:
Defines if a button for choosing the **text language** is displayed or hidden. 
This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor** and the **Presentation Editor**.

features.description: Defines the parameters that the user can disable or customize if possible.

spellcheck.description:
Defines if the **spell checker** is automatically switched on or off when the editor is loaded.
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it is set as the initial spell checker value and the spell checker setting will not be hidden.

mode.description:
Defines if the spell checker is automatically switched on or off when the editor is loaded.
This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor** and the **Presentation Editor**.

change.description: Hide or show feature in **Document Editor**, **Presentation Editor**, **Spreadsheet Editor**

roles.description:
Defines if the **role settings** will be disabled in the **PDF forms** or not.  
If the parameter is equal to `false`, then the **role manager** is hidden and viewing the form on behalf of a specific role is disabled.  
In this case, the **Manage Roles** and **View Form** buttons on the **Forms** tab and a drop-down list for setting the field role in the right panel will not be displayed.

tabStyle.description:
Defines the style of the **top toolbar tabs**.  
If this parameter is a string value (`fill` or `line`), then it is set as the **initial tab style value**  
and the tab style setting will not be hidden.

mode.description:
Defines if the top toolbar tabs are distinctly displayed (`fill`) or  
only highlighted to see which one is selected (`line`).  
The default value is `"fill"`.  
This value is used when the editor is first opened.

change.description:
Defines if the **tab style setting** will be displayed in  
the `File -> Advanced settings` or not.  
This setting is available in **all editor types**.

tabBackground.description:
Defines the **background of the top toolbar tabs**.  
If this parameter is a string value (`header` or `toolbar`), then it is set as the  
**initial tab background value** and the tab background setting will not be hidden.

mode.description:
Defines if the background of the top toolbar tabs matches the **header background** (`header`)  
or the **toolbar background** (`toolbar`).  
This value is used when the editor is first opened.

change.description:
Defines if the **tab background setting** will be displayed in  
the `File -> Advanced settings` or not.  
This setting is available in **all editor types**.

featuresTips.description: Defines if the tooltips about new editor features will be displayed or hidden on first loading.

font.description: Defines the font for the interface elements (buttons, tabs, etc.).

chat.description:
Defines if the **Chat menu button** is displayed or hidden.
@deprecated Starting from version 7.1, please use the `document.permissions.chat` parameter instead.

comments.description: Defines if the **Comments menu button** is displayed or hidden.

zoom.description:
Defines the **document display zoom value** measured in percent.  
Can take values larger than `0`. 
For text documents and presentations it is possible to set this parameter to `-1` (fitting the document to page option) or to `-2` (fitting the document page width to the editor page).

compactToolbar.description:
Defines if the **top toolbar type** displayed is full (`false`) or compact (`true`).  
Starting from version 8.3, this setting is also available for the viewer. The default value for the view mode is `true`.

leftMenu.description:
Defines if the **left menu panel** is displayed or hidden.
@deprecated Starting from version 7.1, please use the `layout.leftMenu` parameter instead.

rightMenu.description:
Defines if the **right menu panel** is displayed or hidden.
@deprecated Starting from version 7.1, please use the `layout.rightMenu` parameter instead.

hideRightMenu.description: Defines if the **right menu** is displayed or hidden on first loading.

toolbar.description:
Defines if the **top toolbar** is displayed or hidden.
@deprecated Starting from version 7.1, please use the `layout.toolbar` parameter instead.

statusBar.description:
Defines if the **status bar** is displayed or hidden.
@deprecated Starting from version 7.1, please use the `layout.statusBar` parameter instead.

autosave.description:
Defines if the **Autosave menu option** is enabled or disabled.  
If set to `false`, only **Strict** co-editing mode can be selected, as **Fast** does not work without autosave.

forcesave.description: Adds the request for the **file force saving** to the callback handler when saving the document within the **document editing service** (e.g., clicking the **Save** button, etc.).

commentAuthorOnly.description:
Defines if the user can **edit and delete only his comments**.
@deprecated Starting from version 6.3, please use the `document.permissions.editCommentAuthorOnly` and `document.permissions.deleteCommentAuthorOnly` fields instead.

showReviewChanges.description:
Defines if the **review changes panel** is automatically displayed or hidden when the editor is loaded.
@deprecated Starting from version 7.0, please use the `review.showReviewChanges` parameter instead.

help.description: Defines if the **Help menu button** is displayed or hidden.

compactHeader.description: Defines if the additional action buttons are displayed in the upper part of the editor window header next to the logo (`false`) or in the toolbar (`true`) making the header more compact.

toolbarNoTabs.description:
Defines if the top toolbar tabs are distinctly displayed (`false`) or only highlighted to see which one is selected (`true`).
@deprecated Starting from version 8.2, please use the `editorConfig.customization.features.tabStyle` parameter which is set to `line` and the `editorConfig.customization.features.tabBackground` parameter which is equal to `toolbar`.

toolbarHideFileName.description: Defines if the document title is visible on the top toolbar (`false`) or hidden (`true`).

reviewDisplay.description:
Defines the review editing mode in the document editor.
@deprecated Starting from version 7.0, please use the `review.reviewDisplay` parameter instead.

compatibleFeatures.description:
Defines the use of functionality only compatible with the **OOXML format**.  
For example, do not use comments on the entire document.

mentionShare.description:
Defines the **hint** that describes the event after mentions in a comment.  
- If `true`, a hint indicates that the user will receive a notification and access to the document.  
- If `false`, a hint indicates that the user will receive only a notification of the mention.

macros.description: Defines if **document macros** will be automatically run when the editor opens.

plugins.description: Defines if **plugins** will be launched and available.

trackChanges.description:
Defines if the document is opened in the **review editing mode** (`true`) or not (`false`)  
regardless of the `document.permissions.review` parameter (the review mode is changed only for the current user).  
If the parameter is `undefined`, the `document.permissions.review` value is used (for all the document users).
@deprecated Starting from version 7.0, please use the `review.trackChanges` parameter instead.

hideRulers.description:
Defines if the **editor rulers** are displayed or hidden.  
This parameter is available for the **Document Editor** and **Presentation Editor**.

hideNotes.description:
Defines if the **note panel** is displayed or hidden on first loading.  
This parameter is available for the **Presentation Editor only**.

uiTheme.description:
Defines the **editor theme settings**. It can be set in two ways:
- **theme id** - the user sets the theme parameter by its id (`theme-light`, `theme-classic-light`, `theme-dark`, `theme-contrast-dark`, `theme-white`, `theme-night`);
- **default theme** - the default dark or light theme value will be set (`default-dark`, `default-light`).  
  The default light theme is `theme-classic-light`. The first option has higher priority.

integrationMode.description:
Defines the **mode of embedding editors into the web page**.  
- The `embed` value disables scrolling to the editor frame when it is loaded, as the focus is not captured.

pointerMode.description: Defines the **pointer mode** (`select` or `hand`) when the presentation editor is loaded in the viewer.

forceView.description: Defines whether the **view mode** is enabled on launch in the mobile document editor.

info.description: Defines whether the **Document Info** button is displayed or hidden in the mobile document editor.

standardView.description: Defines whether the editor will be opened in **Standard view** instead of **Mobile view**.

disableForceDesktop.description: Hide or show UI option to switch editor in **Desktop** type.

submitForm.description:
Defines the **Complete & Submit** button settings.  
Starting from version 8.3. 
If this parameter is a boolean value, then it specifies whether the **Complete & Submit** button will be displayed or hidden on the top toolbar.  
Button will only be available for the **PDF** format.

visible.description:
Defines whether the **Complete & Submit** button will be displayed or hidden on the top toolbar.  
Button will only be available for the **PDF** format.

forceWesternFontSize.description: Defines if the **Western** (`true`) or **Chinese** (`false`) font size is used in the Chinese (Simplified) UI.

slidePlayerBackground.description:
Defines the background color for the slide show in the **Presentation Editor**.  
Can be represented in the HEX, RGB, or RGBA formats. For example, `#ff0000`, `rgb(255, 0, 0)`, `rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.5)`.
Starting from version 8.3,

wordHeadingsColor.description:
Defines the HEX color for the default heading styles in the document editor.
Starting from version 8.3

showVerticalScroll.description:
Defines if the **vertical scroll** is automatically displayed or hidden when the **Spreadsheet Editor** is loaded.
Starting from version 8.3

showHorizontalScroll.description:
Defines if the **horizontal scroll** is automatically displayed or hidden when the **Spreadsheet Editor** is loaded.
Starting from version 8.3

text.description: Caption of the start filling button, used for **PDF Forms**

suggestFeature.description: Defines whether the **Suggest a Feature** menu button will be displayed or hidden.

coEditing.description:
Defines the **co-editing mode** (Fast or Strict) and the possibility to change it.  
This parameter is used to apply the co-editing and viewing modes.

mode.description:
The co-editing mode.
If `fast` and `customization.autosave` = false → set `customization.autosave` = true.

change.description: Defines if the co-editing mode can be changed in the editor interface or not.

plugins.description:
The **plugins** section allows to connect the special add-ons to your ONLYOFFICE Docs installation
which will help you add additional features to document editors.

autostart.description:
Defines the array of the identifiers (as entered in `config.json`) for the plugins,  
which will automatically start when the editor opens, and the order the plugins will run one-by-one.

options.description:
Defines an object which allows configuring plugins from an external source.  
The settings can be set for all plugins or for a specific plugin.  
For example, this object can be used to pass an authorization token to the plugin.  
You can also use the `SetPluginsOptions` method of the Automation API to pass the options object to the plugin.

all.description: Defines the parameters which will be set for all plugins.

pluginGuid.description:
Defines the parameters which will be set for a specific plugin.  
The plugin must be specified with the plugin GUID of the `asc.{UUID}` type.

pluginsData.description: Defines the array of absolute URLs to the plugin configuration files (`config.json`).

url.description:
Defines the absolute URL to the directory where the plugins are stored.
@deprecated Since version 4.3. Please use the absolute URLs in `pluginsData` field instead.

wopi.description: The **wopi** section is used only for WOPI.

FileNameMaxLength.description: Defines the maximum filename length for the rename.

autostart.description:
Defines the action for application autostart.
- For documents: `"document"`.
- For presentations: default is `"player"`.

events.description: The events section allows to change all the functions pertaining to the events.

onDocumentStateChange.description: The function called when the document is modified.

onRequestEditRights.description:
The function called when the user is trying to switch the document from the viewing into the editing mode by clicking the **Edit current file** button.
This event also fires when the user clicks the **Edit PDF** button in forms that are open in the view or **fillForms** mode.
If the method is not declared, the **Edit current file** and **Edit PDF** buttons will not be displayed.

onRequestHistory.description: The function called when the user is trying to show the document **version history** by clicking the **Version History** button.

onRequestHistoryData.description: The function called when the user is trying to click a specific document version in the **document version history**.

onRequestRestore.description: The function called when the user is trying to **restore the file version** by clicking the Restore button in the version history.

onRequestHistoryClose.description: The function called when the user is trying to go back to the document from viewing the **document version history** by clicking the Close History button.

onInfo.description: The function called when the application **opened the file**.

onOutdatedVersion.description:
The function called after the error is shown, when the document is opened for editing with the **old document.key value**.  
This key was used to edit the previous document version and was successfully saved.  
When this event is called, the editor must be reinitialized with a new `document.key`.

onDownloadAs.description: The function called with the **absolute URL** to the edited file when the `downloadAs` method is being called.
examples:
```
function onDownloadAs(event) {
  const fileType = event.data.fileType
  const url = event.data.url
  console.log(`ONLYOFFICE Document Editor create file: ${url}`)
}
```

onRequestSaveAs.description: The function called when the user is trying to **save file** by clicking **Save Copy as...** button.
examples:
```
function onRequestSaveAs(event) {
  const fileType = event.data.fileType
  const title = event.data.title
  const url = event.data.url
}
```

onCollaborativeChanges.description: The function called when the document is co-edited by the other user in the strict co-editing mode.

onRequestRename.description: The function called when the user is trying to rename the file by clicking the **Rename... button**.

onMetaChange.description: The function called when the **meta information of the document** is changed via the `meta` command.

onRequestClose.description: The function called when the user is trying to **end the work with the editor and close it** by clicking the cross button.

onMakeActionLink.description: The function called when the user is trying to **get a link for opening the document** which contains a bookmark, scrolling to the bookmark position.

onRequestUsers.description: The function called when the user can **select other users to mention in comments**, grant access rights to edit specific sheet ranges, or set the user avatars.

onRequestSendNotify.description: The function called when the user is **mentioned in a comment**.
examples:
```
function onRequestSendNotify(event) {
  const ACTION_DATA = event.data.actionLink
  const comment = event.data.message
  const emails = event.data.emails
}
```

onRequestInsertImage.description: The function called when the user is trying to insert an image by clicking the **Image from Storage** button.

onRequestCompareFile.description: The function called when the user is trying to **select a document for comparing** by clicking the Document from Storage button.

onRequestSharingSettings.description: The function called when the user is trying to manage document access rights by clicking the **Change access rights** button.

onRequestCreateNew.description: The function called when the user is trying to create a new document by clicking the **Create New** button.

onRequestReferenceData.description: The function called when the user is trying to refresh data inserted from an external file by clicking the **Update values** button in the **External links** dialog box of the **Data** tab.

onRequestOpen.description: The function called when the user is trying to open an external link by clicking the **Open source** button.

onRequestSelectDocument.description: The function called when the user is trying to select a document for comparing, combining, or inserting text.

onRequestSelectSpreadsheet.description: The function called when the user is trying to select recipients data by clicking the `Mail merge` button.

onRequestReferenceSource.description: The function called when the user is trying to change a source of the external data by clicking the **Change source** button.

onSaveDocument.description: The function called when save document from binary.

onRequestStartFilling.description: The function called when the user is trying to start filling out ready forms by clicking the **Start filling** button in PDF editing mode.

onSubmit.description: The function called when the force saving request of the 3 `forcesavetype` is successfully performed, i.e., when the **Complete & Submit** button is clicked and the form is submitted.

onRequestRefreshFile.description:
The function called instead of the `onOutdatedVersion` event in the following cases:
- When the editor is opened with a key that was already used to successfully save a file.
- When the editor reconnects to the server after losing the connection and interrupting the editing session.

onUserActionRequired.description:
The function called when a user action is required to open a document in the following cases:
- When the user needs to enter a password to open a protected document.
- When the user needs to select an encoding for a TXT file.
- When the user needs to select an encoding and a delimiter for a CSV file.

onRequestFillingStatus.description: The function called to request the filling status for the current role in PDF form filling mode.

onStartFilling.description: The function called when the user can start filling the PDF form.

onAppReady.description: The function called when the application is fully loaded into the browser.

onDocumentReady.description: The function called when the document is loaded into the document editor.

onError.description: The function called when an **error** or some other specific event occurs.

onWarning.description: The function called when a **warning** occurs.

onBack.description: The function called when the user navigates back to the folder.

token.description: Defines the encrypted signature added to the ONLYOFFICE Docs config in the form of a token.

type.description: Defines the platform type used to access the document.

width.description: Defines the document width in the browser window.

height.description: Defines the document height in the browser window.

documentType.description: Defines the document type to be opened.

fileKey.description: The unique document identifier used by the service to get a link to the file.

user.description: The name of the user the document will be shared with.

permissions.description: The access rights for the user with the name above.

isLink.description: Changes the user icon to the link icon.

edit.description: Defines if the document can be edited or only viewed.

download.description: Defines if the document can be downloaded or only viewed or edited online.

review.description: Defines if the document can be reviewed or not.

print.description: Defines if the document can be printed or not.

comment.description: Defines if the document can be commented or not.

modifyFilter.description:
Defines if the filter can applied globally (`true`) affecting all the other users, or locally (`false`), i.e. for the current user only.
- Filter modification will only be available for the spreadsheet editor if the `mode` parameter is set to `edit`.

modifyContentControl.description:
Defines if the content control settings can be changed.
- Content control modification will only be available for the document editor if the `mode` parameter is set to `edit`.

fillForms.description:
Defines if the forms can be filled.
- Filling in forms will only be available for the document and pdf editors if the mode parameter is set to `edit`.

copy.description: Defines if the content can be copied to the clipboard or not.

editCommentAuthorOnly.description: Defines if the user can edit only his/her comments.

deleteCommentAuthorOnly.description: Defines if the user can delete only his/her comments.

reviewGroups.description: Defines the groups whose changes the user can accept/reject.

commentGroups.description: Defines the groups whose comments the user can edit, remove and/or view.

view.description: The user can view comments made by other users.

edit.description: The user can edit comments made by other users.

remove.description: The user can remove comments made by other users.

userInfoGroups.description:
Defines the groups of users whose information is displayed in the editors.
- Usernames are displayed in the list of editing users in the editor header.
- While typing, user cursors and tooltips with their names are displayed.
- When locking objects in the strict co-editing mode, usernames are shown.

protect.description:
Defines if the **Protection** tab on the toolbar and the **Protect** button 
in the left menu are displayed **(true)** or hidden **(false)**.

chat.description: Defines if the chat functionality is enabled in the document or not.

referenceData.description: Defines an object that is generated by the integrator to uniquely identify a file in its system.

info.description: The document info section allows to change additional parameters for the document.

owner.description: Defines the name of the document owner/creator.

folder.description: Defines the folder where the document is stored (can be empty in case the document is stored in the root folder).

sharingSettings.description: Displays the information about the settings which allow to share the document with other users.

favorite.description:
Defines the highlighting state of the Favorite icon. 
When the user clicks the icon, the onMetaChange event is called.

permissions.description: The document permission section allows to change the permission for the document to be edited and downloaded or not.

title.description: Defines the desired file name for the viewed or edited document which will also be used as file name when the document is downloaded.

url.description: Defines the absolute URL where the source viewed or edited document is stored.

fileType.description: Defines the type of the file for the source viewed or edited document.

key.description:
Defines the unique document identifier used by the service to recognize the document.
- Every time the document is edited and saved, the key must be generated anew.
- In case the known key is sent, the document will be taken from the cache.

isForm.description: Defines if the PDF file is a PDF form or a standard PDF file.

title.description: Defines the desired file name for the viewed or edited document which will also be used as file name when the document is downloaded.

url.description: Defines the absolute URL where the source viewed or edited document is stored.

fileType.description: Defines the type of the file for the source viewed or edited document.

key.description:
Defines the unique document identifier used by the service to recognize the document.
- Every time the document is edited and saved, the key must be generated anew.
- In case the known key is sent, the document will be taken from the cache.

data.description: The data associated with the action.

actionLink.description: Specifies the data received from the **document editing service** using the `onMakeActionLink` event or the `onRequestSendNotify` event in `data.actionLink` parameter, which contains the information about the action in the document that will be scrolled to.

mode.description: Defines the editor opening mode.

location.description:
Defines the default measurement units.
@deprecated Starting from version 8.2, use the `region` parameter instead.

createUrl.description:
Defines the absolute URL of the document where it will be created and available after creation.  
- If not specified, the **Create** button will not be displayed.  
- Instead of this parameter, you can use the `onRequestCreateNew` event.

callbackUrl.description:
Specifies the absolute URL to the **document storage service**.  
- This service must be implemented by the software integrators who use ONLYOFFICE Docs on their own server.  
- Url for connection between sdk and portal.

region.description:
Defines the default display format for **currency**, **date**, and **time** (in the **Spreadsheet Editor** only).  
- Is set using the four letter (en-US, fr-FR, etc.) language codes.

user.description: Defines the **user** currently viewing or editing the document.

id.description:
The identification of the user.  
This information is stored and used to:  
- distinguish co-authors,  
- indicate the author of the last changes when saving and highlighting history (in the list of changes),  
- count users with access for a license (based on the number of users).

name.description: The full name of the user.

group.description:
The group (or several groups separated with commas) the user belongs to.
Can be used for `customization.reviewPermissions`, `permissions.reviewGroups`, or `permissions.commentGroups`.

image.description: The path to the user's avatar.

roles.description:
Defines the roles assigned to the user.  
- Used for **PDF forms**, fill form with `Role1`.

recent.description: Defines the presence or absence of the documents in the **Open Recent...** menu option.

templates.description: Defines the presence or absence of the templates in the **Create New...** menu option.

logo.description:
Changes the image file at the top left corner of the editor header.  
The recommended image height is **20 pixels**.

image.description:
Path to the image file used to show in the common work mode (view and edit modes for all editors) or in the embedded mode.  
The image must have the following size: **172x40**.

imageDark.description:
Path to the image file used for the dark header (for example, in a dark theme or in a theme with a colored header).
The image must have the following size: **172x40**.

imageLight.description:
Path to the image file used for the **light header** (for example, in the Gray theme).  
The image must have the following size: **172x40**.

url.description:
The absolute URL which will be used when someone clicks the logo image.  
Can be used to go to your website, etc.  
Leave as an empty string or `null` to make the logo not clickable.

customer.description: Contains the information which will be displayed in the editor **About** section and is visible to all editor users.

name.description: The name of the company or person who gives access to the editors or the editor authors.

address.description: Postal address of the company or person who gives access to the editors or the editor authors.

mail.description: Email address of the company or person who gives access to the editors or the editor authors.

www.description: Home website address of the above company or person.

phone.description: The phone of the company or person who gives access to the editors or the editor authors.

info.description: Some additional information about the company or person you want the others to know.

logo.description:
The path to the image logo.  
- No special recommendations for this file, but it is recommended to use **.png** format with a transparent background.  
- The image must have the following size: **432x70**.

logoDark.description:
The path to the image logo for the **dark theme**.  
- No special recommendations for this file, but it is recommended to use **.png** format with a transparent background.  
- The image must have the following size: **432x70**.

about.description: Defines if the **About** menu button is displayed or hidden.

feedback.description:
Defines settings for the **Feedback & Support** menu button.  
- Can be either **boolean** (simply displays or hides the button) or **object** (to configure settings).

visible.description: Shows or hides the **Feedback & Support** menu button.

url.description: The absolute URL to the website which will be opened when clicking the **Feedback & Support** menu button.

goback.description: Defines settings for the **Open file location** menu button and the upper right corner button.

blank.description: Opens the website in a new browser tab/window (if `true`) or the current tab (if `false`) when the **Open file location** button is clicked.

requestClose.description:
Defines that if the **Open file location** button is clicked, the `events.onRequestClose` event is called instead of opening a browser tab or window.
@deprecated Starting from version 8.1, use the `close` parameter instead.

text.description: The text which will be displayed for the **Open file location** menu button and upper right corner button (i.e. instead of Go to Documents).

url.description: The absolute URL to the website which will be opened when clicking the **Open file location** menu button.

close.description: Defines settings for the **cross button** to close the editor.

visible.description: Defines if the cross button to close the editor is displayed or hidden.

text.description: Defines the tooltip text for the cross button in the editor header or the menu item text in the mobile editors and in the **File** menu of the web editors.

anonymous.description: Adds a request for the anonymous name.

request.description: Defines if the request is sent or not.

label.description: A postfix added to the user name.

review.description: Contains the information about the **review mode**.

hideReviewDisplay.description: Defines if the **Display mode** button is displayed or hidden on the **Collaboration** tab.

hoverMode.description: Defines the review display mode: show reviews in tooltips by hovering the changes (`true`) or in balloons by clicking the changes (`false`).

reviewDisplay.description:
Defines the review editing mode which will be used when the document is opened for viewing.
It will only be available for the document editor if mode is set to **view**. Can take the following values:

showReviewChanges.description: Defines if the review changes panel is automatically displayed or hidden when the editor is loaded.

trackChanges.description:
Defines if the document is opened in the review editing mode (`true`) or not (`false`) regardless of the `document.permissions.review` parameter.  
If `undefined`, the `document.permissions.review` value is used for all document users.

layout.description: Defines the parameters that the user can use to hide the interface elements but not to disable features completely (for example, if this functionality is available from other elements such as context menu, or via hotkeys).

toolbar.description:
Defines the **toolbar** settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **toolbar** will be displayed or hidden.

file.description:
Defines the **File** tab settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **File** tab will be displayed or hidden.

close.description: Defines if the **Close** menu option is displayed or hidden.

settings.description: Defines if the **Advanced settings** option is displayed or hidden.

info.description: Defines if the **Document info** option is displayed or hidden.

save.description: Defines if the **Save** option is displayed or hidden.

home.description: Defines the Home tab settings. This tab cannot be hidden.

mailmerge.description:
Defines if the button for choosing the mail merge base is displayed or hidden.
@deprecated Please use the `toolbar.collaboration.mailmerge` parameter instead.

insert.description:
Defines the **Insert** tab settings.  
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **Insert** tab will be displayed or hidden.

file.description: Text from file button in **Document Editor**.

layout.description:
Defines if the **Layout** tab is displayed or hidden. 
This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor** and the **Spreadsheet Editor**.

references.description:
Defines if the **References** tab is displayed or hidden. 
This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor**.

collaboration.description:
Defines the **Collaboration** tab settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **Collaboration** tab will be displayed or hidden.

mailmerge.description: Defines if the button for choosing the **mail merge** base is displayed or hidden.

draw.description: Defines if the **Draw** tab is displayed or hidden.

protect.description: Defines if the **Protection** tab is displayed or hidden.

plugins.description: Defines if the **Plugins** tab is displayed or hidden.

view.description:
Defines the **View** tab settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **View** tab will be displayed or hidden.

navigation.description:
Defines if the **Navigation** button is displayed or hidden. 
The default value is `true`. This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor**.

save.description: Defines if the **Save** button on the toolbar is displayed or hidden.

editMode.description: Defines if a button for switching editor modes will be displayed in the header or not.

save.description: Defines if the **Save** button in the editor header is displayed or hidden.

user.description: Defines if the icon with the user's avatar/initials in the editor header is displayed or hidden.

users.description: Defines if the button with the editing users is displayed or hidden.

leftMenu.description:
Defines the **left menu** settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **left menu** will be displayed or hidden.

mode.description:
Defines the initial value of the left panel visibility - displayed or hidden. 
It is used for the **Left panel** menu option on the **View** tab.

navigation.description:
Defines if the **Navigation** button is displayed or hidden. 
This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor**.

spellcheck.description:
Defines if the **Spellcheck** button is displayed or hidden. 
This parameter will only be available for the **Spreadsheet Editor**.

rightMenu.description:
Defines the **right menu** settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **right menu** will be displayed or hidden.

mode.description:
Defines the initial value of the right panel visibility - displayed or hidden. 
It is used for the **Right panel** menu option on the **View** tab.

statusBar.description:
Defines the **status bar** settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the status bar will be displayed or hidden.

actionStatus.description: Defines if an **action status** is displayed or hidden.

docLang.description:
Defines if a button for choosing the **document language** is displayed or hidden. 
This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor** and the **Presentation Editor**.

textLang.description:
Defines if a button for choosing the **text language** is displayed or hidden. 
This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor** and the **Presentation Editor**.

features.description: Defines the parameters that the user can disable or customize if possible.

spellcheck.description:
Defines if the **spell checker** is automatically switched on or off when the editor is loaded.
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it is set as the initial spell checker value and the spell checker setting will not be hidden.

mode.description:
Defines if the spell checker is automatically switched on or off when the editor is loaded.
This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor** and the **Presentation Editor**.

change.description: Hide or show feature in **Document Editor**, **Presentation Editor**, **Spreadsheet Editor**

roles.description:
Defines if the **role settings** will be disabled in the **PDF forms** or not.  
If the parameter is equal to `false`, then the **role manager** is hidden and viewing the form on behalf of a specific role is disabled.  
In this case, the **Manage Roles** and **View Form** buttons on the **Forms** tab and a drop-down list for setting the field role in the right panel will not be displayed.

tabStyle.description:
Defines the style of the **top toolbar tabs**.  
If this parameter is a string value (`fill` or `line`), then it is set as the **initial tab style value**  
and the tab style setting will not be hidden.

mode.description:
Defines if the top toolbar tabs are distinctly displayed (`fill`) or  
only highlighted to see which one is selected (`line`).  
The default value is `"fill"`.  
This value is used when the editor is first opened.

change.description:
Defines if the **tab style setting** will be displayed in  
the `File -> Advanced settings` or not.  
This setting is available in **all editor types**.

tabBackground.description:
Defines the **background of the top toolbar tabs**.  
If this parameter is a string value (`header` or `toolbar`), then it is set as the  
**initial tab background value** and the tab background setting will not be hidden.

mode.description:
Defines if the background of the top toolbar tabs matches the **header background** (`header`)  
or the **toolbar background** (`toolbar`).  
This value is used when the editor is first opened.

change.description:
Defines if the **tab background setting** will be displayed in  
the `File -> Advanced settings` or not.  
This setting is available in **all editor types**.

featuresTips.description: Defines if the tooltips about new editor features will be displayed or hidden on first loading.

font.description: Defines the font for the interface elements (buttons, tabs, etc.).

chat.description:
Defines if the **Chat menu button** is displayed or hidden.
@deprecated Starting from version 7.1, please use the `document.permissions.chat` parameter instead.

comments.description: Defines if the **Comments menu button** is displayed or hidden.

zoom.description:
Defines the **document display zoom value** measured in percent.  
Can take values larger than `0`. 
For text documents and presentations it is possible to set this parameter to `-1` (fitting the document to page option) or to `-2` (fitting the document page width to the editor page).

compactToolbar.description:
Defines if the **top toolbar type** displayed is full (`false`) or compact (`true`).  
Starting from version 8.3, this setting is also available for the viewer. The default value for the view mode is `true`.

leftMenu.description:
Defines if the **left menu panel** is displayed or hidden.
@deprecated Starting from version 7.1, please use the `layout.leftMenu` parameter instead.

rightMenu.description:
Defines if the **right menu panel** is displayed or hidden.
@deprecated Starting from version 7.1, please use the `layout.rightMenu` parameter instead.

hideRightMenu.description: Defines if the **right menu** is displayed or hidden on first loading.

toolbar.description:
Defines if the **top toolbar** is displayed or hidden.
@deprecated Starting from version 7.1, please use the `layout.toolbar` parameter instead.

statusBar.description:
Defines if the **status bar** is displayed or hidden.
@deprecated Starting from version 7.1, please use the `layout.statusBar` parameter instead.

autosave.description:
Defines if the **Autosave menu option** is enabled or disabled.  
If set to `false`, only **Strict** co-editing mode can be selected, as **Fast** does not work without autosave.

forcesave.description: Adds the request for the **file force saving** to the callback handler when saving the document within the **document editing service** (e.g., clicking the **Save** button, etc.).

commentAuthorOnly.description:
Defines if the user can **edit and delete only his comments**.
@deprecated Starting from version 6.3, please use the `document.permissions.editCommentAuthorOnly` and `document.permissions.deleteCommentAuthorOnly` fields instead.

showReviewChanges.description:
Defines if the **review changes panel** is automatically displayed or hidden when the editor is loaded.
@deprecated Starting from version 7.0, please use the `review.showReviewChanges` parameter instead.

help.description: Defines if the **Help menu button** is displayed or hidden.

compactHeader.description: Defines if the additional action buttons are displayed in the upper part of the editor window header next to the logo (`false`) or in the toolbar (`true`) making the header more compact.

toolbarNoTabs.description:
Defines if the top toolbar tabs are distinctly displayed (`false`) or only highlighted to see which one is selected (`true`).
@deprecated Starting from version 8.2, please use the `editorConfig.customization.features.tabStyle` parameter which is set to `line` and the `editorConfig.customization.features.tabBackground` parameter which is equal to `toolbar`.

toolbarHideFileName.description: Defines if the document title is visible on the top toolbar (`false`) or hidden (`true`).

reviewDisplay.description:
Defines the review editing mode in the document editor.
@deprecated Starting from version 7.0, please use the `review.reviewDisplay` parameter instead.

compatibleFeatures.description:
Defines the use of functionality only compatible with the **OOXML format**.  
For example, do not use comments on the entire document.

mentionShare.description:
Defines the **hint** that describes the event after mentions in a comment.  
- If `true`, a hint indicates that the user will receive a notification and access to the document.  
- If `false`, a hint indicates that the user will receive only a notification of the mention.

macros.description: Defines if **document macros** will be automatically run when the editor opens.

plugins.description: Defines if **plugins** will be launched and available.

trackChanges.description:
Defines if the document is opened in the **review editing mode** (`true`) or not (`false`)  
regardless of the `document.permissions.review` parameter (the review mode is changed only for the current user).  
If the parameter is `undefined`, the `document.permissions.review` value is used (for all the document users).
@deprecated Starting from version 7.0, please use the `review.trackChanges` parameter instead.

hideRulers.description:
Defines if the **editor rulers** are displayed or hidden.  
This parameter is available for the **Document Editor** and **Presentation Editor**.

hideNotes.description:
Defines if the **note panel** is displayed or hidden on first loading.  
This parameter is available for the **Presentation Editor only**.

uiTheme.description:
Defines the **editor theme settings**. It can be set in two ways:
- **theme id** - the user sets the theme parameter by its id (`theme-light`, `theme-classic-light`, `theme-dark`, `theme-contrast-dark`, `theme-white`, `theme-night`);
- **default theme** - the default dark or light theme value will be set (`default-dark`, `default-light`).  
  The default light theme is `theme-classic-light`. The first option has higher priority.

integrationMode.description:
Defines the **mode of embedding editors into the web page**.  
- The `embed` value disables scrolling to the editor frame when it is loaded, as the focus is not captured.

pointerMode.description: Defines the **pointer mode** (`select` or `hand`) when the presentation editor is loaded in the viewer.

forceView.description: Defines whether the **view mode** is enabled on launch in the mobile document editor.

info.description: Defines whether the **Document Info** button is displayed or hidden in the mobile document editor.

standardView.description: Defines whether the editor will be opened in **Standard view** instead of **Mobile view**.

disableForceDesktop.description: Hide or show UI option to switch editor in **Desktop** type.

submitForm.description:
Defines the **Complete & Submit** button settings.  
Starting from version 8.3. 
If this parameter is a boolean value, then it specifies whether the **Complete & Submit** button will be displayed or hidden on the top toolbar.  
Button will only be available for the **PDF** format.

visible.description:
Defines whether the **Complete & Submit** button will be displayed or hidden on the top toolbar.  
Button will only be available for the **PDF** format.

forceWesternFontSize.description: Defines if the **Western** (`true`) or **Chinese** (`false`) font size is used in the Chinese (Simplified) UI.

slidePlayerBackground.description:
Defines the background color for the slide show in the **Presentation Editor**.  
Can be represented in the HEX, RGB, or RGBA formats. For example, `#ff0000`, `rgb(255, 0, 0)`, `rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.5)`.
Starting from version 8.3,

wordHeadingsColor.description:
Defines the HEX color for the default heading styles in the document editor.
Starting from version 8.3

showVerticalScroll.description:
Defines if the **vertical scroll** is automatically displayed or hidden when the **Spreadsheet Editor** is loaded.
Starting from version 8.3

showHorizontalScroll.description:
Defines if the **horizontal scroll** is automatically displayed or hidden when the **Spreadsheet Editor** is loaded.
Starting from version 8.3

text.description: Caption of the start filling button, used for **PDF Forms**

suggestFeature.description: Defines whether the **Suggest a Feature** menu button will be displayed or hidden.

coEditing.description:
Defines the **co-editing mode** (Fast or Strict) and the possibility to change it.  
This parameter is used to apply the co-editing and viewing modes.

mode.description:
The co-editing mode.
If `fast` and `customization.autosave` = false → set `customization.autosave` = true.

change.description: Defines if the co-editing mode can be changed in the editor interface or not.

plugins.description:
The **plugins** section allows to connect the special add-ons to your ONLYOFFICE Docs installation
which will help you add additional features to document editors.

autostart.description:
Defines the array of the identifiers (as entered in `config.json`) for the plugins,  
which will automatically start when the editor opens, and the order the plugins will run one-by-one.

options.description:
Defines an object which allows configuring plugins from an external source.  
The settings can be set for all plugins or for a specific plugin.  
For example, this object can be used to pass an authorization token to the plugin.  
You can also use the `SetPluginsOptions` method of the Automation API to pass the options object to the plugin.

all.description: Defines the parameters which will be set for all plugins.

pluginGuid.description:
Defines the parameters which will be set for a specific plugin.  
The plugin must be specified with the plugin GUID of the `asc.{UUID}` type.

pluginsData.description: Defines the array of absolute URLs to the plugin configuration files (`config.json`).

url.description:
Defines the absolute URL to the directory where the plugins are stored.
@deprecated Since version 4.3. Please use the absolute URLs in `pluginsData` field instead.

wopi.description: The **wopi** section is used only for WOPI.

FileNameMaxLength.description: Defines the maximum filename length for the rename.

autostart.description:
Defines the action for application autostart.
- For documents: `"document"`.
- For presentations: default is `"player"`.

onDocumentStateChange.description: The function called when the document is modified.

onRequestEditRights.description:
The function called when the user is trying to switch the document from the viewing into the editing mode by clicking the **Edit current file** button.
This event also fires when the user clicks the **Edit PDF** button in forms that are open in the view or **fillForms** mode.
If the method is not declared, the **Edit current file** and **Edit PDF** buttons will not be displayed.

onRequestHistory.description: The function called when the user is trying to show the document **version history** by clicking the **Version History** button.

onRequestHistoryData.description: The function called when the user is trying to click a specific document version in the **document version history**.

onRequestRestore.description: The function called when the user is trying to **restore the file version** by clicking the Restore button in the version history.

onRequestHistoryClose.description: The function called when the user is trying to go back to the document from viewing the **document version history** by clicking the Close History button.

onInfo.description: The function called when the application **opened the file**.

onOutdatedVersion.description:
The function called after the error is shown, when the document is opened for editing with the **old document.key value**.  
This key was used to edit the previous document version and was successfully saved.  
When this event is called, the editor must be reinitialized with a new `document.key`.

onDownloadAs.description: The function called with the **absolute URL** to the edited file when the `downloadAs` method is being called.
examples:
```
function onDownloadAs(event) {
  const fileType = event.data.fileType
  const url = event.data.url
  console.log(`ONLYOFFICE Document Editor create file: ${url}`)
}
```

onRequestSaveAs.description: The function called when the user is trying to **save file** by clicking **Save Copy as...** button.
examples:
```
function onRequestSaveAs(event) {
  const fileType = event.data.fileType
  const title = event.data.title
  const url = event.data.url
}
```

onCollaborativeChanges.description: The function called when the document is co-edited by the other user in the strict co-editing mode.

onRequestRename.description: The function called when the user is trying to rename the file by clicking the **Rename... button**.

onMetaChange.description: The function called when the **meta information of the document** is changed via the `meta` command.

onRequestClose.description: The function called when the user is trying to **end the work with the editor and close it** by clicking the cross button.

onMakeActionLink.description: The function called when the user is trying to **get a link for opening the document** which contains a bookmark, scrolling to the bookmark position.

onRequestUsers.description: The function called when the user can **select other users to mention in comments**, grant access rights to edit specific sheet ranges, or set the user avatars.

onRequestSendNotify.description: The function called when the user is **mentioned in a comment**.
examples:
```
function onRequestSendNotify(event) {
  const ACTION_DATA = event.data.actionLink
  const comment = event.data.message
  const emails = event.data.emails
}
```

onRequestInsertImage.description: The function called when the user is trying to insert an image by clicking the **Image from Storage** button.

onRequestCompareFile.description: The function called when the user is trying to **select a document for comparing** by clicking the Document from Storage button.

onRequestSharingSettings.description: The function called when the user is trying to manage document access rights by clicking the **Change access rights** button.

onRequestCreateNew.description: The function called when the user is trying to create a new document by clicking the **Create New** button.

onRequestReferenceData.description: The function called when the user is trying to refresh data inserted from an external file by clicking the **Update values** button in the **External links** dialog box of the **Data** tab.

onRequestOpen.description: The function called when the user is trying to open an external link by clicking the **Open source** button.

onRequestSelectDocument.description: The function called when the user is trying to select a document for comparing, combining, or inserting text.

onRequestSelectSpreadsheet.description: The function called when the user is trying to select recipients data by clicking the `Mail merge` button.

onRequestReferenceSource.description: The function called when the user is trying to change a source of the external data by clicking the **Change source** button.

onSaveDocument.description: The function called when save document from binary.

onRequestStartFilling.description: The function called when the user is trying to start filling out ready forms by clicking the **Start filling** button in PDF editing mode.

onSubmit.description: The function called when the force saving request of the 3 `forcesavetype` is successfully performed, i.e., when the **Complete & Submit** button is clicked and the form is submitted.

onRequestRefreshFile.description:
The function called instead of the `onOutdatedVersion` event in the following cases:
- When the editor is opened with a key that was already used to successfully save a file.
- When the editor reconnects to the server after losing the connection and interrupting the editing session.

onUserActionRequired.description:
The function called when a user action is required to open a document in the following cases:
- When the user needs to enter a password to open a protected document.
- When the user needs to select an encoding for a TXT file.
- When the user needs to select an encoding and a delimiter for a CSV file.

onRequestFillingStatus.description: The function called to request the filling status for the current role in PDF form filling mode.

onStartFilling.description: The function called when the user can start filling the PDF form.

onAppReady.description: The function called when the application is fully loaded into the browser.

onDocumentReady.description: The function called when the document is loaded into the document editor.

onError.description: The function called when an **error** or some other specific event occurs.

onWarning.description: The function called when a **warning** occurs.

onBack.description: The function called when the user navigates back to the folder.

onAppReady.description: The function called when the application is fully loaded into the browser.

onDocumentReady.description: The function called when the document is loaded into the document editor.

onError.description: The function called when an **error** or some other specific event occurs.

onWarning.description: The function called when a **warning** occurs.

document.description: The document section allows to change all the parameters pertaining to the document (title, url, file type, etc.).

referenceData.description: Defines an object that is generated by the integrator to uniquely identify a file in its system.

info.description: The document info section allows to change additional parameters for the document.

owner.description: Defines the name of the document owner/creator.

folder.description: Defines the folder where the document is stored (can be empty in case the document is stored in the root folder).

sharingSettings.description: Displays the information about the settings which allow to share the document with other users.

favorite.description:
Defines the highlighting state of the Favorite icon. 
When the user clicks the icon, the onMetaChange event is called.

permissions.description: The document permission section allows to change the permission for the document to be edited and downloaded or not.

title.description: Defines the desired file name for the viewed or edited document which will also be used as file name when the document is downloaded.

url.description: Defines the absolute URL where the source viewed or edited document is stored.

fileType.description: Defines the type of the file for the source viewed or edited document.

key.description:
Defines the unique document identifier used by the service to recognize the document.
- Every time the document is edited and saved, the key must be generated anew.
- In case the known key is sent, the document will be taken from the cache.

isForm.description: Defines if the PDF file is a PDF form or a standard PDF file.

editorConfig.description: The editorConfig section allows to change the parameters pertaining to the editor interface: opening mode (viewer or editor), interface language, additional buttons, etc.

actionLink.description: Specifies the data received from the **document editing service** using the `onMakeActionLink` event or the `onRequestSendNotify` event in `data.actionLink` parameter, which contains the information about the action in the document that will be scrolled to.

mode.description: Defines the editor opening mode.

location.description:
Defines the default measurement units.
@deprecated Starting from version 8.2, use the `region` parameter instead.

createUrl.description:
Defines the absolute URL of the document where it will be created and available after creation.  
- If not specified, the **Create** button will not be displayed.  
- Instead of this parameter, you can use the `onRequestCreateNew` event.

callbackUrl.description:
Specifies the absolute URL to the **document storage service**.  
- This service must be implemented by the software integrators who use ONLYOFFICE Docs on their own server.  
- Url for connection between sdk and portal.

region.description:
Defines the default display format for **currency**, **date**, and **time** (in the **Spreadsheet Editor** only).  
- Is set using the four letter (en-US, fr-FR, etc.) language codes.

user.description: Defines the **user** currently viewing or editing the document.

id.description:
The identification of the user.  
This information is stored and used to:  
- distinguish co-authors,  
- indicate the author of the last changes when saving and highlighting history (in the list of changes),  
- count users with access for a license (based on the number of users).

name.description: The full name of the user.

group.description:
The group (or several groups separated with commas) the user belongs to.
Can be used for `customization.reviewPermissions`, `permissions.reviewGroups`, or `permissions.commentGroups`.

image.description: The path to the user's avatar.

roles.description:
Defines the roles assigned to the user.  
- Used for **PDF forms**, fill form with `Role1`.

recent.description: Defines the presence or absence of the documents in the **Open Recent...** menu option.

templates.description: Defines the presence or absence of the templates in the **Create New...** menu option.

logo.description:
Changes the image file at the top left corner of the editor header.  
The recommended image height is **20 pixels**.

image.description:
Path to the image file used to show in the common work mode (view and edit modes for all editors) or in the embedded mode.  
The image must have the following size: **172x40**.

imageDark.description:
Path to the image file used for the dark header (for example, in a dark theme or in a theme with a colored header).
The image must have the following size: **172x40**.

imageLight.description:
Path to the image file used for the **light header** (for example, in the Gray theme).  
The image must have the following size: **172x40**.

url.description:
The absolute URL which will be used when someone clicks the logo image.  
Can be used to go to your website, etc.  
Leave as an empty string or `null` to make the logo not clickable.

customer.description: Contains the information which will be displayed in the editor **About** section and is visible to all editor users.

name.description: The name of the company or person who gives access to the editors or the editor authors.

address.description: Postal address of the company or person who gives access to the editors or the editor authors.

mail.description: Email address of the company or person who gives access to the editors or the editor authors.

www.description: Home website address of the above company or person.

phone.description: The phone of the company or person who gives access to the editors or the editor authors.

info.description: Some additional information about the company or person you want the others to know.

logo.description:
The path to the image logo.  
- No special recommendations for this file, but it is recommended to use **.png** format with a transparent background.  
- The image must have the following size: **432x70**.

logoDark.description:
The path to the image logo for the **dark theme**.  
- No special recommendations for this file, but it is recommended to use **.png** format with a transparent background.  
- The image must have the following size: **432x70**.

about.description: Defines if the **About** menu button is displayed or hidden.

feedback.description:
Defines settings for the **Feedback & Support** menu button.  
- Can be either **boolean** (simply displays or hides the button) or **object** (to configure settings).

visible.description: Shows or hides the **Feedback & Support** menu button.

url.description: The absolute URL to the website which will be opened when clicking the **Feedback & Support** menu button.

goback.description: Defines settings for the **Open file location** menu button and the upper right corner button.

blank.description: Opens the website in a new browser tab/window (if `true`) or the current tab (if `false`) when the **Open file location** button is clicked.

requestClose.description:
Defines that if the **Open file location** button is clicked, the `events.onRequestClose` event is called instead of opening a browser tab or window.
@deprecated Starting from version 8.1, use the `close` parameter instead.

text.description: The text which will be displayed for the **Open file location** menu button and upper right corner button (i.e. instead of Go to Documents).

url.description: The absolute URL to the website which will be opened when clicking the **Open file location** menu button.

close.description: Defines settings for the **cross button** to close the editor.

visible.description: Defines if the cross button to close the editor is displayed or hidden.

text.description: Defines the tooltip text for the cross button in the editor header or the menu item text in the mobile editors and in the **File** menu of the web editors.

anonymous.description: Adds a request for the anonymous name.

request.description: Defines if the request is sent or not.

label.description: A postfix added to the user name.

review.description: Contains the information about the **review mode**.

hideReviewDisplay.description: Defines if the **Display mode** button is displayed or hidden on the **Collaboration** tab.

hoverMode.description: Defines the review display mode: show reviews in tooltips by hovering the changes (`true`) or in balloons by clicking the changes (`false`).

reviewDisplay.description:
Defines the review editing mode which will be used when the document is opened for viewing.
It will only be available for the document editor if mode is set to **view**. Can take the following values:

showReviewChanges.description: Defines if the review changes panel is automatically displayed or hidden when the editor is loaded.

trackChanges.description:
Defines if the document is opened in the review editing mode (`true`) or not (`false`) regardless of the `document.permissions.review` parameter.  
If `undefined`, the `document.permissions.review` value is used for all document users.

layout.description: Defines the parameters that the user can use to hide the interface elements but not to disable features completely (for example, if this functionality is available from other elements such as context menu, or via hotkeys).

toolbar.description:
Defines the **toolbar** settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **toolbar** will be displayed or hidden.

file.description:
Defines the **File** tab settings. 
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **File** tab will be displayed or hidden.

close.description: Defines if the **Close** menu option is displayed or hidden.

settings.description: Defines if the **Advanced settings** option is displayed or hidden.

info.description: Defines if the **Document info** option is displayed or hidden.

save.description: Defines if the **Save** option is displayed or hidden.

home.description: Defines the Home tab settings. This tab cannot be hidden.

mailmerge.description:
Defines if the button for choosing the mail merge base is displayed or hidden.
@deprecated Please use the `toolbar.collaboration.mailmerge` parameter instead.

insert.description:
Defines the **Insert** tab settings.  
If this parameter is a **boolean** value, then it specifies whether the **Insert** tab will be displayed or hidden.

file.description: Text from file button in **Document Editor**.

layout.description:
Defines if the **Layout** tab is displayed or hidden. 
This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor** and the **Spreadsheet Editor**.

references.description:
Defines if the **References** tab is displayed or hidden. 
This parameter will only be available for the **Document Editor**.

collaboration.description:
Defines the **Collaboration** tab settings.
